title: AI Model Hierarchy Configurator

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Hierarchy Configurator

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#F7F7F7`
* `#C06C88`
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='50' y='50' width='300' height='200' rx='10' fill='#F7F7F7'/><rect x='70' y='70' width='60' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='70' y='100' width='60' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='170' y='70' width='60' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='170' y='100' width='60' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='70' y='70' y='130' width='60' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='170' y='130' width='60' height='20' rx='5' fill='#C06C88'/><circle cx='220' cy='70' r='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><circle cx='220' cy='130' r='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/><path d='M 220 90 L 200 100 L 240 100' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='2'/><text x='220' y='90' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' fill='#090a0f'>Node 1</text><text x='220' y='140' text-anchor='middle' font-size='12' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' fill='#090a0f'>Node 2</text></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use the specified colors and layouts.
Must include features for adding nodes, setting node properties, and visualizing the hierarchy.
Must be fully interactive with state updates and dynamic rendering.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Hierarchy Configurator

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, node addition, editing, and deletion.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
